summary: todo show does not render the analysis section
description:
\`todo show <id>\` reads ticket.analysis (an array of AnalysisEntry) but the
display layer never renders it. The data is persisted correctly (visible
in the raw .json), but invisible to humans. This silently defeats the
\`todo analyze\` paper-trail use case: notes attached mid-implementation
exist but can't be read back without cat-ing the JSON.

Repro:
  todo analyze <id> --type conclusion --content "test note" --confidence high
  todo show <id>      # analysis section missing

Done contract: src/commands/show.ts emits each analysis entry (timestamp,
author, type, content, confidence). Test in tests/commands/show.test.ts
that adds an analysis entry and asserts it appears in the rendered output.
